sentences.arabic: كَتَبْتُ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ فِي دَفْتَرِ رِحْلَتِي عَنِ الأَمَاكِنِ الَّتِي زُرْتُهَا.
sentences.translation: Svaki dan sam pisao u svom putnom dnevniku o mjestima koja sam posjetio.
sentences.translationEn: Every day I wrote in my travel journal about the places I had visited.

sentences.arabic: سَجَّلْتُ الأَشْيَاءَ الَّتِي أَعْجَبَتْنِي وَتِلْكَ الَّتِي لَمْ تُعْجِبْنِي.
sentences.translation: Bilježio sam stvari koje su mi se svidjele i one koje mi nisu.
sentences.translationEn: I recorded things I liked and things I did not.

sentences.arabic: أَلْصَقْتُ تَذَاكِرَ الزِّيَارَةِ وَصُوَرًا صَغِيرَةً فِي الدَّفْتَرِ.
sentences.translation: Lijepilo sam ulaznice i male fotografije u dnevnik.
sentences.translationEn: I stuck entry tickets and small photos into the journal.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا عُدْتُ إِلَى بَيْتِي قَرَأْتُ الدَّفْتَرَ وَتَذَكَّرْتُ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ.
sentences.translation: Kad sam se vratio kući, pročitao sam dnevnik i prisjetio se svega.
sentences.translationEn: When I returned home, I read the journal and remembered everything.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ يَوْمِيَّاتُ السَّفَرِ هَدِيَّةً لِنَفْسِي فِي الْمُسْتَقْبَلِ.
sentences.translation: Putni dnevnik bio je poklon samome sebi za budućnost.
sentences.translationEn: The travel diary was a gift to my future self.
